pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which writes the spam number to this path.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which initializes did_pattern '8885550100' and verifier.py which checks its configuration.
Confirmed via export_result.sh and verifier.py which query for filter_phone_group_id 'SPAMBLOCK'.
Confirmed via verifier.py which checks if the group name contains 'blocked spammers'.
Confirmed via verifier.py which asserts that the did_action is set to 'HANGUP'.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated spam number (2025550188) placed in /home/ga/Documents/VicidialData/spam_number_to_block.txt. It is verified that the target DID is 8885550100, which must be configured to link with a newly created filter group (ID: SPAMBLOCK, Name: Blocked Spammers) with the action set to HANGUP.
